Dentist Level Clean
Equipped with dentist developed technology that delivers up to 50,000 repetitions per minute, the Sonic Pro Toothbrush delivers a dentist-level clean at home.
YOUR MOST
Advanced Brushing Experience Yet
MADE BY DENTISTS

“As dentists, we see every day how small improvements in daily brushing can make a big difference to long-term oral health. Many people are brushing too hard, missing areas, or simply not getting the level of clean they think they are. We designed our Sonic Electric Toothbrush range to take the guesswork out of brushing. With gentle sonic power, multiple modes and brushes designed to reach where manual brushing often misses, they helps deliver a deeper clean while protecting gums and enamel. So brushing your teeth becomes something simple, effective, and easy to feel confident about every day.”

Dr. Lisa Creaven & Dr. Vanessa Creaven
Co-Founders of Spotlight Oral Care
Frequently asked questions

settings.heading: What is the difference between the Sonic Pro and the Sonic Toothbrush?

settings.text: The Sonic Pro Toothbrush works in the same way as the Sonic, using high-frequency brush movements to ensure a deep and thorough clean. However, the Sonic Pro has an additional setting “Polish” which reaches 50,000 reps per minute. The Sonic Pro also features a Pressure Sensor to protect gums from excessive brushing, a Micro Point Tongue Cleaner to help alleviate bad breath, and a two-minute Visual Quadrant Timer.

settings.heading: What makes the Sonic Pro Toothbrush different from a regular electric toothbrush?

settings.text: Our Sonic Pro Toothbrush has four different cleaning modes - gentle, clean, white and polish so that you can customise your brushing experience to meet your specific needs with the sonic toothbrush doing all the work for you. The high-frequency brush movements ensure that both your toothpaste and oxygen reach those little spaces between your teeth that can be hard to get to. This technique ensures your teeth are receiving the best clean possible with the sonic doing all the work for you.

settings.heading: What do the 4 cleaning modes do?

settings.text:
Gentle Mode - 30,000 RPM: Vibrates with lower intensity, gently brushing teeth and gums. If you have sensitive teeth or gums or you find the sonic vibrations a little strong at first start off with the gentle mode.

Clean Mode - 40,000 RPM: Works with superior efficiency to clean deep between the teeth and to remove plaque.

White Mode - 45,000 RPM: Works at a higher intensity to remove surface stains caused by coloured food and beverages such as tea and coffee.

Polish Mode - 50,000 RPM: Buffs and shines the surface of the teeth to reveal a whiter and brighter smile.

settings.heading: How does the Visual Quadrant Timer on the Sonic Pro Toothbrush work?

settings.text: The Sonic Pro Toothbrush timer works by pausing briefly every 30 seconds for each quarter of the mouth and turning off fully when the 2 minute brushing time has elapsed.

settings.heading: How long should I charge the toothbrush for?

settings.text: Charge time is a full 10 hours for our Sonic Pro Toothbrush to ensure long-lasting battery life.

settings.heading: How often should I change the brush head?

settings.text: We advise people to change their toothbrush head every 3 months.

settings.heading: Can I use the Sonic Pro Toothbrush on crowns and veneers?

settings.text: Yes, our Sonic Pro Toothbrush can be safely used on crowns and veneers.

settings.heading: Who is the Sonic Pro Toothbrush suitable for?

settings.text: Suitable for children over 6 years of age with adult supervision.

settings.heading: Which replacement heads can I use with the Sonic Pro?

settings.text: Our Sonic Pro replacement heads are compatible with this device, any other replacement heads are not suitable
